steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states that flat‑headed cats have a rigid hyoid that rumbles when the larynx vibrates, producing a purr.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
The matching choice directly names the flat‑headed cat's rigid hyoid bone, which the text says causes the purr.
The other three either describe something not mentioned as the cause (larynx shape, ligament attachment, body size) or contradict the explanation.
C is correct.
